title: Bachelor of Church Ministry
description: Focusing on the practical aspects of leading and managing church organizations and educational programs.
fullDescription: The Bachelor of Church Ministry is tailored for students who intend to serve as church administrators, educators, or ministry leads. While grounded in theology, the emphasis remains on the practical execution of ministry within a local community.
objectives: Design and implement effective Christian Education programs.
Apply biblical principles to church leadership and finance.
Lead various ministry departments including Youth and Children's Ministry.
Effectively counsel church members using biblical methods.
admissionRequirements: Local Church Membership for at least 2 years
Recommendation from Church Elder or Pastor
